name: raycast-trading
title: Trading
description: A Raycast extension for trading — markets status, watch list, and configuration.
author: linbudu599

commands.name: display-markets
commands.title: Display Markets
commands.description: Display the current markets status panel.

commands.name: display-watch-funds
commands.title: Display Watch Funds
commands.description: Display watched Mainland China fund NAV performance.

commands.name: search-stock
commands.title: Search Stock
commands.description: Search latest stock quotes with trading session status.

commands.name: configure-watchlist
commands.title: Configure Watch List
commands.description: Add or remove symbols from your watch list.
